title: 16S rRNA Library Preparation for Illumina MiSeq
author: Somasundhari Shanmuganandam
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6i7hchn
materials: Bring the AMPure XP beads to room temperature.
Thaw MiSeq reagent cartridge in 25°C water bath
Invert reagent cartridge and buffer bottle to mix

steps.title: The PCR reaction setup is given...
steps.instruction: The PCR reaction setup is given below %s %s ReagentsVolume (µl) for 25µl reactionTemplate DNAVaries (2.5-25 ng per 25 µL reaction)Water, nuclease-free Upto 25µL5X SuperFi™ Buffer15 µL10 mM dNTP mix 0.5 µL 10 µM forward primer 1.25 µL10 µM reverse primer 1.25 µLPlatinum™ SuperFi™ DNA Polymerase (2 U/µL0.25 µL5X SuperFi™ GC Enhancer (optional)5µL Add reagents and DNA in a sterilised PCR tube in the order given above

steps.title: PCR cycle conditions
steps.instruction: PCR cycle conditions: Initial denaturation at 98°C for 30 sec 25 cycles of : 98°C for 10 sec 55°C for 15 sec 72°C for 30 sec Final extension at 72°C for 10 min

steps.title: Prepare two Axygen plate with each...
steps.instruction: Prepare two Axygen plate with each well containing 200 μl of 80% ethanol

steps.title: Using a multichannel pipette set to...
steps.instruction: Using a multichannel pipette set to 20 μl, transfer the entire Amplicon PCR product to the Axygen plate. Change tips between samples.

steps.title: Vortex the AMPure XP beads for...
steps.instruction: Vortex the AMPure XP beads for 30 seconds to make sure that the beads are evenly dispersed.

steps.title: Add 20 μl of AMPure XP...
steps.instruction: Add 20 μl of AMPure XP beads (1:1 ratio) to each well on the plate

steps.title: Gently pipette entire volume up and...
steps.instruction: Gently pipette entire volume up and down 10 times using pipette

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature without shaking for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature without shaking for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Place a sheath on the coppin...
steps.instruction: Place a sheath on the coppin device (a device shaped like a 96 well plate with magnets attached at each well similar to 96-well Microtiter Plate Magnetic Separation Rack) and insert into the plate wells containing PCR product

steps.title: Allow beads to bind to the...
steps.instruction: Allow beads to bind to the coppin device for 2 mins and use this device to transfer the beads to first ethanol plate.

steps.title: Transfer beads to second ethanol half plate
steps.instruction: Transfer beads to second ethanol half plate

steps.title: Remove beads from ethanol using coppin...
steps.instruction: Remove beads from ethanol using coppin device and invert it on the bench so that the beads are facing up.

steps.title: Air dry at room temperature for...
steps.instruction: Air dry at room temperature for 10 minutes (still on coppin device)

steps.title: Using a multichannel pipette, add 52
steps.instruction: Using a multichannel pipette, add 52.5 μl of 10 mM Tris pH 8.5 (Buffer EB) to each well of the Amplicon PCR plate. Cover when not in use.

steps.title: With air dried bead still on...
steps.instruction: With air dried bead still on the device, insert sheath into the well containing Tris and remove the coppin device whilst leaving the sheath in the solution

steps.title: Resuspend beads by gently swishing the sheath in the Tris
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads by gently swishing the sheath in the Tris. If beads don’t come off, use magnetic base to remove the stuck beads and remove the plate immediately.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes without shaking
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes without shaking

steps.title: Put fresh sheath on Coppin device...
steps.instruction: Put fresh sheath on Coppin device and insert into Tris for 2 mins

steps.title: Remove and discard the beads and the sheath
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the beads and the sheath.

steps.title: Using a multichannel pipette, remove the...
steps.instruction: Using a multichannel pipette, remove the cleaned up product from the well and place it into PCR tube

steps.title: Run 5 µL of cleaned-up product...
steps.instruction: Run 5 µL of cleaned-up product in 1% agarose gel for 20 mins at 100V to check the size of the band (~500 bp)

steps.title: Run 5 µL of PCR product...
steps.instruction: Run 5 µL of PCR product in 1% agarose gel for 20 mins at 100V to check the size of the band (~460 bp)

steps.title: Nextera XT Index Kit (N7XX and...
steps.instruction: Nextera XT Index Kit (N7XX and S5XX) is used for the following set-up to add barcodes PCR reaction setup is given below %s %s Reagents Volume (50µl)Water, nuclease-freeUpto 50µl5X SuperFi™ Buffer110µl2µM primer (each)5µlTemplate 5µlPlatinum™ SuperFi™ DNA Polymerase (2 U/µL0.5µl10 mM dNTP mix 1µl

steps.title: Cycle conditions for the above reavtion...
steps.instruction: Cycle conditions for the above reavtion volume is Initial denaturation at 98°C for 30 sec 8 cycles of : 98°C for 10 sec 55°C for 15 sec 72°C for 30 sec Final extension of 10 min at 72°C.

steps.title: Follow step 4 to step 25...
steps.instruction: Follow step 4 to step 25 but use 45 μl of AMPure XP in step 8 and 27.5 μl of 10 mM Tris pH 8.5 in step 18.

steps.title: Run 5 µL of PCR product...
steps.instruction: Run 5 µL of PCR product in 1% agarose gel for 20 mins at 100V to check the size of the band (~550 bp)

steps.title: Run 5 µL of PCR product...
steps.instruction: Run 5 µL of PCR product in 1% agarose gel for 20 mins at 100V to check the size of the band. Run it next to stage 1 clean up product to check whether the product size is increased by addition of barcodes

steps.title: Quantify the stage 2 PCR product...
steps.instruction: Quantify the stage 2 PCR product in Qubit high sensitivity assay

steps.title: Run tapestation on selection of samples to check the length
steps.instruction: Run tapestation on selection of samples to check the length

steps.title: Pool equimolar volume of each sample...
steps.instruction: Pool equimolar volume of each sample together to get a final concentration of 4 nM (1.17 ng /μl)

steps.title: Qubit the pooled sample using high...
steps.instruction: Qubit the pooled sample using high sensitivity assay to ensure the concentration is 4 nM (1.17 ng /μl)

steps.title: Thaw the HT1 reagent and pooled...
steps.instruction: Thaw the HT1 reagent and pooled library at room temperature and store it in ice box

steps.title: Prepare a fresh dilution of 0
steps.instruction: Prepare a fresh dilution of 0.2N NaOH (800 μl of dH20 + 200 μl of 1N NaOH)

steps.title: Combine 5 μl of pooled library...
steps.instruction: Combine 5 μl of pooled library with 5 μl of 0.2N NaOH Note : Work quickly from this step forward

steps.title: Vortex briefly and centrifuge for 1 min at 300 g
steps.instruction: Vortex briefly and centrifuge for 1 min at 300 g.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 mins at room...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 mins at room temperature (start as soon as centrifuge stops)

steps.title: Immediately add 990 μl of pre-chilled HT1 to denatured DNA
steps.instruction: Immediately add 990 μl of pre-chilled HT1 to denatured DNA. Place in ice until needed. This gives 20 pM of denatured library

steps.title: Prepare 20 pM dilution of PhiX
steps.instruction: Prepare 20 pM dilution of PhiX

steps.title: Dilute denatured DNA to a final concentration of 9
steps.instruction: Dilute denatured DNA to a final concentration of 9.5 pM by taking 285 μl of denatured library and adding 315 μl of pre-chilled HT1 (final volume 600 μl )

steps.title: Invert several times to mix and pulse centrifuge
steps.instruction: Invert several times to mix and pulse centrifuge. Place it in ice

steps.title: Dilute 20 pM denatured PhiX to...
steps.instruction: Dilute 20 pM denatured PhiX to same concentration as final library. Can be performed by adding 285 μl of 20 pM denatured PhiX with 315 μl pre-chilled HT1

steps.title: Invert several times to mix and pulse centrifuge
steps.instruction: Invert several times to mix and pulse centrifuge. Place it in ice

steps.title: Combine 60 μl of denatured, diluted...
steps.instruction: Combine 60 μl of denatured, diluted PhiX with 540 μl of denatured diluted library

steps.title: Incubate the combined library at 96 °C for 2 min
steps.instruction: Incubate the combined library at 96 °C for 2 min

steps.title: Invert several times to mix and place on ice immediately
steps.instruction: Invert several times to mix and place on ice immediately

steps.title: Load sample into reagent cartridge
steps.instruction: Load sample into reagent cartridge

steps.title: Wash flow cell with water, dry and wash with ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash flow cell with water, dry and wash with ethanol

steps.title: Load flow cell, reagent cartridge, buffer...
steps.instruction: Load flow cell, reagent cartridge, buffer bottle, waste bottle into MiSeq. Ensure sample sheet is loaded. Start the run
